title: Share board view with password
excerpt: I’ve got a board view I want to share with a third party (not requiring them to sign up) but would like some sort of secure way of confirming access.

posts.author: phxk (K)
posts.cookedHtml: I’ve got a board view I want to share with a third party (not requiring them to sign up) but would like some sort of secure way of confirming access.
